data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for audit-friendly status/timeline constraints.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of audit-friendly status/timeline constraints preventing ambiguous states. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific details or records demonstrating the existence of such constraints. While the linked use case mentions the need for these constraints, there are no concrete examples or data points in the prior step evidence that confirm their implementation or coverage, leading to an inconclusive assessment.
gaps: No evidence of audit-friendly status/timeline constraints.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
